summary: Phase 5 PhD-level analysis of the Consciousness Layer: NeuralSwarm (190+ agents, duplicate instantiations), QuantumThought (12+ Omega weight injection phases), Monte Carlo Engine (5000 simulations, Merton Jump Diffusion + 4096D hyperspace), Regime Detector (16 regimes, V-Pulse override), Byzantine Consensus (Brier Score), and Genetic Forge (15-min mutation cycle). Critical bugs: duplicate agent instantiations, shadow trade JSON schema mismatch, missing regimes in Monte Carlo.
